name: Hyrule RP (BOTW/TOTK Map) Remake
description:
Hyrule has been saved twice, but now strange occurrences are becoming commonplace across the lands...


rifts in time have opened up as a result of Zelda's time traveling escapades.

Bringing in characters from the past and even other timelines!

I'm not going to be posting these in the discord, sorry guys, I'm pretty sure I ticked some people off last time when I just dumped a whole boatload of images and basically spam pinged everyone who had notifs on.

More Characters!: I will be adding new characters to this bot as time goes on and I want new things, lorebooks basically giving me infinite room to work with. Let me know who you want to see and I'll
see if it's doable.
